sections.paragraph:
παραδιατριβή, ῆς, ἡ waste of time in unimportant matters, useless occupation pl. 1 Ti 6:5 v.l. (cp. Field, Notes 211).—M-M.

  1. pl. = plural

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Field, Notes Field, Notes = Notes on the Translation of the NT

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 761
